name: @faraday/runtime
description: The Faraday runtime layer (ui, blocks, runtime, styles, world, lms, lib). Vendored verbatim into generated lessons under src/faraday/** by @faraday-kit/cli and locked with a SHA-256 manifest — the source of truth for the copied-in code, not an installed dependency. Deps below exist only so the workspace (e.g. @faraday/labs) can typecheck + preview it; a real lesson satisfies them from its own package.json. react/react-dom are peers so a consumer dedupes to one copy.
